items.name: SuperSONIC® Double Cheeseburger
items.description: Two 100% pure seasoned beef patties layered with two slices of melty American cheese, crinkle cut pickles, ketchup, onions, creamy mayo, lettuce, and tomatoes on a golden, toasted bun.
items.longDescription: Two 100% pure seasoned beef patties layered with two slices of melty American cheese, crinkle cut pickles, ketchup, onions, creamy mayo, lettuce, and tomatoes on a golden, toasted bun.

items.name: SuperSONIC® Bacon Double Cheeseburger
items.description: Two 100% pure seasoned beef patties layered with two slices of melty American cheese, crispy bacon, creamy mayo, lettuce, and tomatoes on a golden, toasted bun.
items.longDescription: Two 100% pure seasoned beef patties layered with two slices of melty American cheese, crispy bacon, creamy mayo, lettuce, and tomatoes on a golden, toasted bun.

items.name: SONIC® Cheeseburger

items.longDescription: A 100% pure seasoned beef patty layered with melty American cheese, crinkle cut pickles, ketchup, onions, creamy mayo, lettuce, and tomatoes on a golden, toasted bun.

items.name: All-American SONIC Smasher™
items.description: Two patties made with Angus beef, seasoned, smashed and seared, crispy on the edges, and juicy in the middle. Layered with two slices of melty American cheese, crinkle-cut pickles, ketchup, onions, creamy mayo, lettuce, and tomato, served on a pillowy soft potato bun.
items.longDescription: Two patties made with Angus beef, seasoned, smashed and seared, crispy on the edges, and juicy in the middle. Layered with two slices of melty American cheese, crinkle-cut pickles, ketchup, onions, creamy mayo, lettuce, and tomato, served on a pillowy soft potato bun.

items.name: All-American Bacon SONIC Smasher™
items.description: Two patties made with Angus beef, seasoned, smashed and seared, crispy on the edges, and juicy in the middle. Layered with two slices of melty American cheese, crispy bacon, crinkle-cut pickles, ketchup, onions, creamy mayo, lettuce, and tomato, served on a pillowy soft potato bun.

items.name: Jr Double Cheeseburger
items.description: Our Jr Double Cheeseburger starts with two juicy, 100% pure beef patties, seasoned and layered with a slice of melty American cheese, pickles, ketchup, and mustard, all on a golden, toasted bun.
items.longDescription: Our Jr Double Cheeseburger starts with two juicy, 100% pure beef patties, seasoned and layered with a slice of melty American cheese, pickles, ketchup, and mustard, all on a golden, toasted bun.

items.name: Double SONIC Smasher™
items.description: The Double SONIC® Smasher has two patties made with Angus beef, seasoned patties smashed and seared, crispy on the edges and juicy in the middle. It’s then layered with two slices of melty American cheese, a creamy, tangy Smasher sauce, crinkle-cut pickles, diced onions, and served on a pillowy soft potato bun.
items.longDescription: The Double SONIC® Smasher has two patties made with Angus beef, seasoned patties smashed and seared, crispy on the edges and juicy in the middle. It’s then layered with two slices of melty American cheese, a creamy, tangy Smasher sauce, crinkle-cut pickles, diced onions, and served on a pillowy soft potato bun.

items.name: Crispy Chicken Sandwich
items.description: A crispy chicken fillet with pickles, lettuce, and mayonnaise on a brioche bun.
items.longDescription: A crispy chicken fillet with pickles, lettuce, and mayonnaise on a brioche bun.

items.name: Triple SONIC Smasher™
items.description: The Triple SONIC® Smasher has three patties made with Angus beef, seasoned patties smashed and seared, crispy on the edges and juicy in the middle. It’s then layered with three slices of melty American cheese, a creamy, tangy Smasher sauce, crinkle-cut pickles, diced onions, and served on a pillowy soft potato bun.
items.longDescription: The Triple SONIC® Smasher has three patties made with Angus beef, seasoned patties smashed and seared, crispy on the edges and juicy in the middle. It’s then layered with three slices of melty American cheese, a creamy, tangy Smasher sauce, crinkle-cut pickles, diced onions, and served on a pillowy soft potato bun.

items.name: Fish Sandwich
items.description: Our Fish Sandwich features a 100% Wild Caught Alaska Pollock Fillet, creamy tartar sauce and lettuce on a golden, toasted bun.
items.longDescription: Our Fish Sandwich features a 100% Wild Caught Alaska Pollock Fillet, creamy tartar sauce and lettuce on a golden, toasted bun.

items.name: All-American Dog
items.description: SONIC's All-American Dog is topped with ketchup, yellow mustard, relish, diced onions and served in a soft, warm bakery bun.
items.longDescription: SONIC's All-American Dog is topped with ketchup, yellow mustard, relish, diced onions and served in a soft, warm bakery bun.
